questions.question: Which of the following correctly characterises the regulatory and structural aspects of the NPS Vatsalya scheme, as launched in 2024? The scheme is administered by the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA). Contributions under NPS Vatsalya are pooled into a government-managed consolidated fund without individual accounts. The scheme allows a smooth shift to a regular NPS account when the subscriber turns 18 years of age. Upon attaining adulthood, subscribers must compulsorily exit NPS Vatsalya and opt for the Atal Pension Yojana.

Which of the following statements about the PM Electric Drive Revolution in Innovative Vehicle Enhancement (PM E-DRIVE) Scheme launched in 2024 is/are correct? The scheme will remain in force until 31 March 2026. One of the key aims of PM E-DRIVE is to provide direct subsidies to petrol and diesel vehicles to improve their fuel efficiency. The scheme includes provisions to support the development of EV charging infrastructure. PM E-DRIVE focuses exclusively on private vehicle ownership.
Which programme of the Indian Government uses Socio-Economic and Caste Census (SECC) data for identifying beneficiaries?
questions.option_2: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act

questions.option_3: Ease of transport for inter-state freight vehicles

questions.question: What is the target length for the development of a national highway network in India by 2025?

Which of the following statements regarding the Dharti Aaba Janjatiya Gram Utkarsh Abhiyan launched in 2024 is/are correct? The scheme aims for the holistic development of tribal areas through 25 interventions in health, education and livelihood. The scheme benefits only 10 states with scheduled areas, excluding other tribal areas. It was launched by Vice President Jagdeep Dhankhar in Jharkhand on 2ⁿᵈ October 2024.

Which of the following government schemes focuses on the development of urban infrastructure in India?
In which year was the Smart Cities Mission launched to enhance the quality of life in 100 selected cities by providing efficient services, robust infrastructure, and a sustainable environment?
What is the Technology & Innovation Sub-Mission (TISM), launched in 2024 as a part of PMAY-U 2.0, related to?
questions.option_1: It is focused on promoting green building techniques and energy-efficient housing designs across geo-climatic regions.
questions.option_2: It is intended to facilitate digitisation of urban housing records and streamline approval processes for construction permits.
questions.option_3: It is introduced to provide housing loans to first-time homebuyers with dynamic interest rates based on income levels.
questions.option_4: It is meant to promote skill certification and labour reforms in the real estate sector through training schemes.

questions.question: Which of the following components is included in the Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana PMAY-U 2.0 scheme launched in 2024 to provide housing solutions specifically for migrants and workers?
What is the purpose of the Urban Infrastructure Development Fund (UIDF) announced in the Union Budget 2023-24?
questions.option_4: To utilise priority sector lending shortfall

questions.question: Which of the following statements regarding the Namo Drone Didi scheme launched during 2024 are correct? It is a central sector scheme aimed at empowering women-led SHGs through drone-based agricultural services. The scheme is primarily implemented by the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology. The scheme aims to enhance the income of women SHGs by providing drones for use in agriculture.
